hypothesis: Incorporating phase- and composition-dependent activation energies into the simulator will enable an LLM-guided synthesis planner to achieve at least a 30 percentage-point higher success rate and at least a 25% lower mean scaled mean-squared-error on multi-phase target challenges (e.g., Challenges 2 and 3) compared to the same LLM coupled to the current constant‑Ea JMA kinetics model.
